hero.headline: Precision Auto Repair, Body Work & Wheel Alignment You Can Rely On
hero.subheadline: From minor tune-ups to major collision repair, our certified technicians deliver quality workmanship and honest service to keep you safe on the road.

featureSections.title: Comprehensive Mechanical & Diagnostic Services
featureSections.body: Whether you need routine maintenance or complex engine repairs, our ASE-certified mechanics use state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to get the job done right the first time. We service all makes and models with transparent pricing and a focus on longevity.
bullets: Oil changes, fluid flushes, and tune-ups
AC repair and electrical system troubleshooting
featureSections.cardBody: Our advanced scanners pinpoint issues quickly, saving you time and money on unnecessary repairs.

featureSections.title: Expert Body Shop & Paint Services
featureSections.body: From minor dents and scratches to major collision damage, our body shop restores your vehicle to its pre-accident condition. We handle insurance claims and provide color-matched painting for a seamless finish.
bullets: Dent removal and paintless dent repair
Full and partial paint jobs with color matching
Insurance claim assistance and rental coordination
featureSections.cardBody: We use premium paint systems to ensure your car looks like new, with a durable finish that lasts.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team holds ASE certifications and undergoes continuous training to stay current with the latest automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Honest, Upfront Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: We provide detailed estimates before any work begins, with no hidden fees or unnecessary repairs.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: Most repairs are completed within 24 hours, and we offer express service for minor maintenance.

whyChooseUs.title: Warranty on All Repairs
whyChooseUs.description: Every service we perform is backed by a comprehensive warranty for your peace of mind.

testimonials.quote: Ramirez Auto Repair did an amazing job on my truck's transmission. They explained everything clearly and had it done in two days. Highly recommend!

testimonials.quote: Fair prices, honest mechanics, and quick work. I've been coming here for years and won't go anywhere else.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Back on the Road?

servicesPage.intro: At Ramirez Auto Repair, we offer a full range of automotive services to keep your vehicle running smoothly and looking great. From routine maintenance to major collision repair, our skilled technicians deliver quality work at fair prices.

services.title: Auto Repair & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive mechanical services including engine, transmission, brakes, and routine maintenance.
services.longDescription: Our ASE-certified mechanics handle everything from oil changes to complete engine overhauls. We use only quality parts and follow manufacturer specifications to ensure your vehicle performs reliably. Services include diagnostics, brake repair, suspension work, cooling system service, and more.
benefits: Extends vehicle life and improves performance
Prevents costly breakdowns with regular maintenance

process.title: 1. Comprehensive Inspection
process.description: We perform a multi-point inspection to identify issues and assess the overall health of your vehicle.

process.title: 2. Detailed Estimate
process.description: You receive a clear, itemized estimate with no surprises. We explain all recommended repairs.

process.title: 3. Quality Repair & Testing
process.description: Our technicians complete the work efficiently, followed by a road test to ensure everything is perfect.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most vehicles need an oil change every 3,000-5,000 miles, but check your owner's manual for specific intervals. We recommend synthetic oil for newer engines.

faqs.question: Do you work on all car makes and models?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service all domestic and import vehicles, including trucks and SUVs.

services.title: Body Shop & Collision Repair
services.shortDescription: Professional collision repair, dent removal, and custom paint jobs to restore your vehicle's appearance.
services.longDescription: Our body shop is equipped to handle everything from minor scratches to major collision damage. We use computer-aided measuring systems for precise frame alignment and factory-matched paint for a seamless finish. We also assist with insurance claims and provide rental car coordination.
benefits: Restores vehicle safety and structural integrity
Fast turnaround to get you back on the road

process.title: 1. Damage Assessment
process.description: We thoroughly inspect the damage and provide a detailed repair plan and estimate.

process.title: 2. Precision Repair & Painting
process.description: Our technicians repair dents, align panels, and apply multiple coats of paint with clear coat protection.

process.title: 3. Final Quality Check
process.description: We inspect the finish and ensure all panels fit perfectly before returning your vehicle.

faqs.question: Will my insurance cover the repair?
faqs.answer: We work with all major insurance companies and can help you file a claim. Most collision repairs are covered under comprehensive or collision coverage.

faqs.question: How long does a typical body repair take?
faqs.answer: Minor repairs can be done in a day, while major collision work may take a week or more. We'll give you a timeline upfront.

services.title: Wheel Alignment & Tire Services
services.shortDescription: Precision wheel alignment, tire balancing, and tire replacement to improve handling and tire life.
services.longDescription: Proper wheel alignment is crucial for even tire wear, stable handling, and fuel efficiency. We use state-of-the-art alignment equipment to adjust camber, caster, and toe angles to manufacturer specifications. We also offer tire rotation, balancing, and new tire installation.
benefits: Extends tire life and improves fuel economy
Enhances steering response and vehicle stability
Includes a free alignment check with tire purchase

process.title: 1. Tire Inspection
process.description: We check tire condition, pressure, and tread depth to determine if rotation or replacement is needed.

process.title: 2. Alignment Setup
process.description: Your vehicle is mounted on our alignment rack, and we adjust angles to factory specs.

process.title: 3. Test Drive & Verification
process.description: We take a test drive to confirm the alignment is correct and the steering feels straight.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need an alignment?
faqs.answer: Signs include uneven tire wear, your car pulling to one side, or a crooked steering wheel when driving straight.

faqs.question: How often should I get an alignment?
faqs.answer: It's recommended every 10,000-12,000 miles or whenever you install new tires.

services.title: Diagnostics & Electrical Systems
services.shortDescription: Advanced computer diagnostics and electrical repair for check engine lights, battery, alternator, and more.
services.longDescription: Modern vehicles rely on complex electrical systems. Our diagnostic tools can quickly identify issues with the engine, transmission, ABS, airbags, and other electronic modules. We repair or replace alternators, starters, batteries, sensors, and wiring harnesses.
benefits: Restores vehicle performance and safety features
Includes a detailed report of findings

process.title: 1. Scan & Retrieve Codes
process.description: We connect our diagnostic scanner to read error codes from the vehicle's computer.

process.title: 2. Interpret & Inspect
process.description: Our technician interprets the codes and performs visual inspections to pinpoint the root cause.

process.title: 3. Repair & Clear Codes
process.description: We perform the necessary repair and clear the codes, then test to ensure the issue is resolved.

faqs.question: Why is my check engine light on?
faqs.answer: It could be something minor like a loose gas cap or something more serious like an oxygen sensor failure. We can quickly diagnose the issue.

faqs.question: Do you repair hybrid or electric vehicles?
faqs.answer: Yes, our technicians are trained to work on hybrid and electric vehicle systems, including battery diagnostics.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Family-Owned Auto Repair Shop
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair and body shop services that keep our community safe and moving. We treat every customer like family and every car like our own.
story: Ramirez Auto Repair was founded over 15 years ago with a simple mission: deliver expert automotive service with integrity. What started as a small two-bay shop has grown into a full-service facility serving Dallas and the surrounding areas. Our founder, a master mechanic with decades of experience, built the business on the belief that customers deserve transparent communication and fair pricing.

Today, we continue that tradition with a team of ASE-certified technicians who share a passion for cars and a commitment to excellence. We invest in the latest diagnostic equipment and training to ensure we can handle any repair, from a simple oil change to a complex engine rebuild. Our loyal customers return because they trust us to be honest, efficient, and skilled.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs. Our estimates are transparent, and we stand by our work.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use premium parts and follow manufacturer specifications to ensure lasting results.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We communicate clearly and respect your time and budget.

coreValues.title: Continuous Improvement
coreValues.description: We stay updated with the latest automotive technology and training to serve you better.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Ramirez Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have a question? Call us or fill out the form below, and we'll get back to you promptly.
